name: Pecan French Toast
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Italian bread; cut into 1-inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a whisk, beat eggs, orange juice, milk, sugar, nutmeg and vanilla.
2. Place bread with edges touching, in a layer, in a large baking dish. Pour the milk mixture over bread, cover and refrigerate overnight. Turn once.
3. Preheat oven to 400°F.
4. Pour melted butter on a jelly roll pan or large cookie sheet with sides.
5. Arrange soaked slices in a single layer on pan. Sprinkle with orange peel and pecans.
6. Bake for 20 minutes, checking slices during the last 10 minutes.
